explanation: The diagram shows strong signs of responsibility/dependency concentration, especially in Policy Management Backend. It is connected to multiple frontends (Customer Self-Service Frontend, Policy Management Frontend), multiple backends/services (Customer Self-Service Backend, Customer Core, Spring Boot Admin), and also acts as an integration hub to Risk Management Server via ActiveMQ. Customer Self-Service Backend and Customer Management Backend also have several cross-service dependencies, creating a tightly coupled mesh rather than clear bounded contexts. This level of centralization and fan-in/fan-out indicates one or more services are behaving like mini-monolith coordinators, which is characteristic of the Microservice Greedy smell.
